summary: Completed testing of Site Settings expansion and WebSocket route changes (iteration 9). All new site settings fields are working correctly. WebSocket routes are defined at /api/ws/live/stream and /api/ws/live/watch. Admin Live Panel has corrected OBS Virtual Camera instructions. Frontend Config. Site tab shows all 8 sections.
passed_tests: GET /api/site-settings returns all new fields (footer_text, social_*, section_title_*, nav_label_live/videos/subscription)
PUT /api/site-settings accepts and persists new fields
PUT /api/site-settings requires admin authentication (401)
WebSocket routes defined at /api/ws/live/stream and /api/ws/live/watch
GET /api/live/status returns correct structure (is_live, title, viewer_count, subscribers_only)
Admin login works with correct credentials
Admin dashboard loads successfully
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Identidade do Site' section
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Cores' section
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Textos do Site' section
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Menu de Navegacao' section with Live, Videos, Assinatura entries
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Textos dos Botoes' section (no 'Botao Pagar Cartao')
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Titulos das Secoes' section (Campanhas, Produtos, Biografia, Galeria)
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Rodape' section with footer text field
Admin Config. Site tab shows 'Redes Sociais' section (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Twitter/X, Facebook)
Admin Live Panel shows Virtual Camera instructions
Admin Live Panel shows 'Ferramentas > Iniciar Camera Virtual' step
Admin Live Panel shows 'OBS Virtual Camera' selection instruction
Admin Live Panel has NO hardcoded RTMP URL
Admin Live Panel has NO stream key reference
Frontend LivePage.js uses /api/ws/live/watch WebSocket path
Frontend AdminLivePanel.js uses /api/ws/live/stream WebSocket path
Live page shows 'Nenhuma live no momento' when not live
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site settings expansion is complete with all new fields (footer_text, section_title_*, social_*, nav_label_live/videos/subscription). WebSocket routes are at /api/ws/live/stream (admin) and /api/ws/live/watch (viewers). OBS instructions use Virtual Camera method, no RTMP/stream key. Stripe was removed in previous iteration - only PIX payments.

websocket_routes.note: WebSocket endpoints return 404 for HTTP GET (expected behavior - they only respond to WebSocket upgrade requests)

steps: Configure cenas e fontes no OBS
